prompts.label: 🔥 Prompt 1 — Frontend + Payments
prompts.title: React Ecommerce Frontend with Cart, Checkout & Razorpay
prompts.text:
Build me a production-ready React + TypeScript ecommerce frontend using Vite for a local Indian store (kiryana/general store) — think quick-commerce style like grocery delivery apps.

=== MY STORE DETAILS ===
- Store Name: [Your Store Name]
- Tagline: [One line description]
- Categories: [e.g., Grocery, Dairy, Snacks, Beverages, Household]
- Delivery Charge: ₹40 flat for delivery, free for self-pickup
- 15-20 products with: name, price (₹), category, emoji placeholder, one-line description

=== PAGES I NEED ===
1. Product catalog (home) — grid with category filter pills, search, add-to-cart with quantity stepper, floating cart button with badge
2. Product detail — full info + related products from same category
3. Checkout — order summary, delivery vs pickup toggle, customer form (name, email, phone, notes), live total calculation
4. OTP verification — 6-digit input with auto-focus, resend with cooldown
5. Order tracking — visual status timeline (Verified → Accepted → Paid → Shipped → Delivered), payment button when accepted, shipping info when shipped

=== KEY REQUIREMENTS ===
- Zustand for cart state with localStorage persistence
- Dark theme with glassmorphism cards — dark background, purple accent (#7C6FE9), green for success (#34D399)
- Mobile-first responsive (2-col grid on mobile, 3-4 on desktop)
- Hindi/English toggle — custom i18n with translations object
- All data from API — configurable VITE_API_URL env variable
- Lazy-loaded routes with React Router v6
- Confetti animation on successful payment callback

=== API ENDPOINTS TO CALL ===
GET /api/catalog — product list
GET /api/catalog/:id — single product + related
POST /api/order — place order
POST /api/order/verify — verify OTP
POST /api/order/resend-otp — resend OTP
GET /api/track/:order_ref — order status

Give me complete file structure with all files — components, pages, store, utils, styles. No placeholders, no truncation.
prompts.tip: Yeh prompt structure aur pages define karta hai — but tumhe apne products, design preferences, aur translations khud decide karne padenge. Generic mat rakhna, apne store ke hisaab se customize karo.

prompts.label: ⚡ Prompt 2 — Backend + Database
prompts.title: Cloudflare Workers Backend with D1, OTP, Razorpay & Emails
prompts.text:
Build me a backend API using Cloudflare Workers with D1 (SQLite) database and KV storage for an Indian ecommerce store.

=== WHAT IT NEEDS TO HANDLE ===
- Product catalog (CRUD)
- Order placement with OTP verification (email-based, 6-digit, KV-stored with TTL)
- Razorpay payment links (create via API when order accepted, webhook for payment confirmation)
- Transactional emails via Resend (OTP, payment link, confirmation, shipping, rejection)
- Admin authentication (email + API key + OTP, session in KV)
- Rate limiting per route per IP (KV-based)

=== DATABASE TABLES I NEED ===
- products — name, sku, category, price, cost_price, stock_qty, min_qty, max_daily_qty, supplier info, active flag
- orders — order_ref (ORD-XXXXX format), customer info, status flow (pending → verified → accepted → paid → shipped → delivered), delivery type (delivery/pickup), payment fields, AI decision fields, shipping fields
- order_items — links orders to products with quantity and pricing
- purchase_orders — supplier POs with status (draft/sent/received), items as JSON
- daily_summaries — date-wise stats, AI insights, low stock data as JSON

=== ORDER FLOW ===
1. Customer places order → validate stock & quantities → generate OTP → send email
2. Customer verifies OTP → order status becomes 'verified'
3. Admin accepts → create Razorpay payment link (1hr expiry) → email customer
4. Customer pays → Razorpay webhook updates status to 'paid'
5. Admin ships (delivery) or marks ready (pickup) → email customer
6. Admin marks delivered

=== KEY DETAILS ===
- Bindings: env.DB (D1), env.STORE_KV (KV)
- Secrets via wrangler: Resend, Razorpay, Anthropic API keys, admin credentials
- Razorpay Payment Links API (not checkout.js) — amount in paise, Basic auth
- Webhook signature verification with HMAC SHA256
- OTP: 10-min TTL, max 5 verify attempts, max 3 resends with 60s cooldown
- Admin routes skip rate limiting
- All emails include delivery type badge and delivery notes

Give me complete Worker project — wrangler.toml, schema.sql, seed.sql with sample products, all route handlers, email templates, middleware. No placeholders.
prompts.tip: Yeh prompt architecture aur flow define karta hai — but tumhe Razorpay account setup, Resend domain verification, Cloudflare bindings configuration, aur email template design khud karna padega. Documentation padho in services ki.

prompts.label: 🧠 Prompt 3 — AI Agents + Cron
prompts.title: AI Fraud Detection + Stock Analysis + Daily Cron Job
prompts.text:
Add two AI agents and a daily cron job to my existing Cloudflare Workers ecommerce backend. The backend already has D1 database (orders, products, purchase_orders, daily_summaries tables), KV storage, Resend for emails.

=== AI AGENT 1: ORDER FRAUD DETECTION ===
Trigger: Runs after every successful OTP verification.

What to send to AI:
- The new order details (items, quantities, total, delivery type, notes)
- Last 24hrs of orders from same email
- Stock levels for ordered items

What AI should check:
- Duplicate orders from same email in 24hrs
- Quantities exceeding product limits
- Unusually high order totals
- Suspicious delivery notes
- Bulk ordering of single items

AI responds with: decision (approved/flagged), reasoning in Hindi, list of flag reasons.
Save decision to order record. Flagged orders need manual admin review.
IMPORTANT: If AI call fails, default to approved — don't block the order.

=== AI AGENT 2: STOCK ANALYSIS ===
Trigger: Admin clicks 'Run AI' button OR daily cron job.

What to send to AI:
- Today's orders with items
- Full product stock list with min quantities and supplier info
- Previous day's summary if available

What AI should return:
- Daily business summary in Hindi
- Low stock alerts with urgency levels (critical/high/medium)
- Auto-generated purchase orders for critical items, grouped by supplier
- Business insights and patterns

Save results to daily_summaries table. Create draft POs in purchase_orders table.

=== CRON JOB ===
- Cloudflare Workers Cron Trigger — daily at 11 PM IST (17:30 UTC)
- Runs Agent 2 automatically
- Sends admin email if critical stock items found
- Logs last run timestamp in KV

=== AI PROVIDER ===
Use Anthropic Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-20250514). All AI responses in Hindi/Hinglish.
Zero-cost alternative: Replace with Cloudflare Workers AI (@cf/meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct) — add [ai] binding in wrangler.toml, use env.AI.run() instead of fetch.

Give me the AI agent modules, updated route handlers, cron handler, and email templates. Show both Claude API and Workers AI alternatives.
prompts.tip: Yeh prompt AI logic ka skeleton deta hai — but system prompts ko fine-tune karna, edge cases handle karna (kya hoga jab stock 0 ho? jab supplier email na ho?), aur AI response parsing robust banana — yeh sab tumhara kaam hai. Test karo, iterate karo.
